title: Shared Sources, Tenant Subscriptions, State Machines, and Races · Inference Brief: Feed Ts Source State Machine
summary: Equivalent URLs create duplicate pollers, unfollow removes shared entries, source state is a boolean, IDs imply authorization, and check-then-insert races remain. Predict the reader decision, external-unknown boundary, Promise and AbortSignal ownership, PostgreSQL transaction, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed ts source state machine increment in idempotent shared-source subscription service. Learners progress through…
objectives: Model pending, active, paused, moved, failing, disabled, deleted, and appealed transitions with actors and causes.
Create and remove tenant-scoped follows without deleting shared source history and expose explicit desired-state semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
